questions.question: Plants liberate some carbon dioxide when in darkness, but the amount they absorb in sunlight exceeds their nocturnal yield.
An ocean of mercury 30 inches deep all over the earth would have the same weight as the atmosphere.
Five straight lines (none parallel) have as many intersections as they form triangles.
If g (acceleration of gravity) on the moon is roughly one-sixth that on the earth, on the moon a body requires the square root of 6 times as long to fall from a given height.
The stalactite grows down from the ceiling; the stalagmite rises up from the floor.
All solids are more soluble with rise in temperature.
Over long timescales (thousands of years), the shape of the Big Dipper remains constant and fixed.
Neutrons can be accelerated by an electrostatic field.
The primary bow (of the rainbow) is red on its outer side.
Pi does not satisfy any polynomial equation with integral coefficients.
The logarithm of 1 to any base is zero.
